news.title:
West Asia tensions disrupt India's medical tourism and pharma trade, affecting travel and exports.
Airspace restrictions and shipping detours may slow patient flows, raising logistics costs.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions disrupt India's medical tourism and pharma trade, affecting travel and exports.
Airspace restrictions and shipping detours may slow patient flows, raising logistics costs.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare approves merger of 4 subsidiaries into Fortis Hospitals.
Merger effective from March 1, 2026, post filing with Registrar.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare approves merger of 4 subsidiaries into Fortis Hospitals.
Merger effective from March 1, 2026, post filing with Registrar.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare's promoter filed a legal claim in Tokyo court against Daiichi Sankyo, seeking damages of INR 109.3B.
The claim includes defamation and share acquisition obstruction, potentially impacting corporate affairs and investor perception.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare's promoter filed a legal claim in Tokyo court against Daiichi Sankyo, seeking damages of INR 109.3B.
The claim includes defamation and share acquisition obstruction, potentially impacting corporate affairs and investor perception.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare held an investor/analyst meet on Feb 16, 2026, discussing Q3FY26 results.
Audio recording of the meet is available on Fortis Healthcare's website for reference.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare held an investor/analyst meet on Feb 16, 2026, discussing Q3FY26 results.
Audio recording of the meet is available on Fortis Healthcare's website for reference.

news.title: Fortis Healthcare anticipates Q3 growth with improving margins, as per Vivek Goyal.
news.summary: Fortis Healthcare anticipates Q3 growth with improving margins, as per Vivek Goyal.

news.title:
IHH Healthcare boosts stake in Fortis via preferential allotment for debt repayment.
The investment also aims to support Fortis Healthcare's growth initiatives.
news.summary:
IHH Healthcare boosts stake in Fortis via preferential allotment for debt repayment.
The investment also aims to support Fortis Healthcare's growth initiatives.

news.title: Fortis Healthcare expects 4-5% growth in average revenue per occupied bed in 2 years.
news.summary: Fortis Healthcare expects 4-5% growth in average revenue per occupied bed in 2 years.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare aims to add 400 beds to existing hospitals by FY27.
The expansion targets improved healthcare services and enhanced patient care.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare aims to add 400 beds to existing hospitals by FY27.
The expansion targets improved healthcare services and enhanced patient care.

news.title:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.
news.summary:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare reports 19% revenue growth in hospital business YoY.
Consolidated growth stands at 17.5%, with focus on expansion strategies.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare reports 19% revenue growth in hospital business YoY.
Consolidated growth stands at 17.5%, with focus on expansion strategies.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare Q3 net profit drops 21.9% to ₹193.7 crore.
Revenue grows 17.5% to ₹2,265 crore; EBITDA rises 35% to ₹506 crore.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare Q3 net profit drops 21.9% to ₹193.7 crore.
Revenue grows 17.5% to ₹2,265 crore; EBITDA rises 35% to ₹506 crore.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare approved Q3 FY26 financials and proposed ESOP of 1.5 crore shares.
The company disclosed investigations on past transactions and updated RPT policy.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare approved Q3 FY26 financials and proposed ESOP of 1.5 crore shares.
The company disclosed investigations on past transactions and updated RPT policy.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare Ltd's board meeting is scheduled on Feb 13, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window will remain closed until Feb 15, 2026, post financial results announcement.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare Ltd's board meeting is scheduled on Feb 13, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window will remain closed until Feb 15, 2026, post financial results announcement.

news.title: Delhi HC issues criminal complaint against Fortis Healthcare over forged term sheet in Walmark dispute.
news.summary: Delhi HC issues criminal complaint against Fortis Healthcare over forged term sheet in Walmark dispute.

news.title:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.
news.summary:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare's merger scheme with subsidiaries has been approved by NCLT Delhi and Chandigarh.
The merger aims to enhance operational efficiency, reducing costs without any cash or shares issued.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare's merger scheme with subsidiaries has been approved by NCLT Delhi and Chandigarh.
The merger aims to enhance operational efficiency, reducing costs without any cash or shares issued.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare executed a block trade of ~278,226 shares at Rs. 912.2.
The total value of the block trade amounted to Rs. 25.38 crores.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare executed a block trade of ~278,226 shares at Rs. 912.2.
The total value of the block trade amounted to Rs. 25.38 crores.

news.title:
Fortis subsidiary IHL acquired TMI Healthcare via share purchase agreement.
The acquisition includes hospital operations, land, and buildings, completed on Jan 9, 2026.
news.summary:
Fortis subsidiary IHL acquired TMI Healthcare via share purchase agreement.
The acquisition includes hospital operations, land, and buildings, completed on Jan 9, 2026.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare plans over 3,200 new beds by 2030, with strategic acquisitions in Bangalore and Punjab.
Focus areas include medical tourism growth, higher ARPOB, occupancy rates, and Diagnostic B2C segment expansion.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare plans over 3,200 new beds by 2030, with strategic acquisitions in Bangalore and Punjab.
Focus areas include medical tourism growth, higher ARPOB, occupancy rates, and Diagnostic B2C segment expansion.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare shared an investor presentation at JP Morgan 2026 Healthcare Conference in the USA.
The presentation covered market data, business highlights, financials, ESG initiatives, and network details.
news.summary:
